setup: B_Alpaca knife-edge, capped side: 204 Lv 6.0 Lancers (no hero) vs Alpaca's AURA'D Gatot-led FC1 T1 Infantry - one below the threshold; the Infantry survives the full 1500-turn cap untouched. Pairs with the 205v1 battle (kill at 575).

turn_inference.cadence: once per attack (triggers == rounds, exact); 1500 = the global battle cap
assumptions: Gatot S2 King's Bestowal triggers == battle rounds (Stage-4 verified)
battle reached the global 1500-round cap; attacker repelled with the defender alive

stats_capture.notes: identical loadout to the paired 205v1 battle

troop_passives_active.reason: Lancers are ordinary/FC<3 - not unlocked; battle stays Type 1

stats_capture.notes: Infantry panels AURA'D: 514.1 = 176.2 baseline + 337.9 ~= Gatot Expedition +337.85 (hero-screen-consistent, no alliance delta)

hero_skills.name: King's Bestowal
hero_skills.effect: fires once per attack; shield with protection = Attack x 12% for 1 turn (L2)

hero_skills.name: Royal Legion
hero_skills.effect: instills fear: -15% enemy Attack, once at battle start (L3)

notes: B_ALPACA KNIFE-EDGE PAIR (with 205v1_..._004208): 204 Lancers' pooled damage sits fully inside Alpaca's shield budget - the Gatot Infantry takes ZERO casualties across all 1500 rounds; adding ONE Lancer (205) breaks through and kills at 575.
Martin's framing (verbatim intent): 204 Lancers cannot kill the single Infantry WITHIN 1500 TURNS - the cap, not immortality, defines the defeat.

Defender counter-clock data: the aura'd Gatot Infantry scored 4 kills + 6 lightly-injured against T6 Lancers over 1500 rounds (~1 kill / 375 rounds) - a rare G_l(Lancer, T6) datapoint, unmeasured cell.
kills cross-check: defender kills 4 == attacker losses+injured 4 (lightly-injured excluded per convention); attacker kills 0 == defender casualties 0.

missing: attacker FC badge (ordinary vs FC1; base identical by convention, both proc-free)
